ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "deployment_name" TEXT /* Name of the deployment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "location" TEXT /* General location of the deployment */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the deployment site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the deployment site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the deployment */,
  "deployment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the deployment */,
  "deployment_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator for the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, conductivity) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the deployment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_executions" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC execution */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation being QC'd */,
  "qc_type" TEXT /* Type of QC (e.g., temperature, pressure, conductivity) */,
  "qc_executed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if QC was executed (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "qc_results" INTEGER /* Results of the QC (1 for pass, 0 for fail) */,
  "qc_executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the QC */,
  "qc_executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the QC was executed */,
  "qc_execution_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the QC execution */,
  "qc_execution_result" TEXT /* Result of the QC execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_executions_qc_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("qc_executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_executions_qc_type FOREIGN KEY ("qc_type") REFERENCES qc_types ("qc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_log_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "sensor_deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor deployment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment */,
  "deployment_start" TEXT /* Start date of the sensor deployment */,
  "deployment_end" TEXT /* End date of the sensor deployment */,
  "sensor_deployment_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the sensor deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_reading_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_types" (
  "qc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC type */,
  "qc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the QC type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the QC type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_type_id")
)
